response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 10% below threshold but our cluster is in mutual deficit with all peers constrained; accepting 0.5 kWh would drop our reserve below the 60% self-preservation floor needed for islanded stability.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster in mutual energy deficit; r1c3 SoC 44% and declining. All peers rejecting outbound transfers due to own reserve constraints. Prioritize inbound reception and self-preservation. Resume sharing only if SoC exceeds 60% or grid restoration confirmed..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
